category_sources: source_facts.description says Bento4 is a full-featured MP4 format and MPEG DASH library and tools.
display_name_sources: Official Bento4 homepage and GitHub repository use Bento4 branding.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Bento4 site; /documentation is the dedicated official documentation path.
repo_sources: Official Bento4 homepage links to axiomatic-systems/Bento4 on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes ISO-MP4 library and included command-line applications.
source_facts.description mentions MP4, MPEG DASH, library, and tools.
